descript.abstract: This data set represents the fire districts throughout the State of Arkansas.
descript.purpose: The data set was created to aid the Arkansas Fire Pension Review Board in determining turn back funds to the fire districts that participate in a pension plan.
descript.supplinf: The fire districts are certified by each county fire coordinator, County Judge, and 911 coordinator if applicable. Each county was certified as of December 15, 2005.

idinfo.useconst: This data set should only be used for visual analysis and official reporting to the Arkansas Fire Pension Review Board
idinfo.datacred: UALR GIS Applications Laboratory & Arkansas Fire Pension Review Board
idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.3.0.4322

attracc.attraccr: The data set is maintained on GeoStor. All efforts have been made to provide the correct attribute information. Errors can be reported to the UALR GIS Applications Laboratory.

dataqual.logic: The data set is maintained on GeoStor. All efforts have been made to provide the correct boundary information. Errors can be reported to the UALR GIS Applications Laboratory.

procstep.procdesc: Each certified boundary was merged together forming a statewide data set
County maps with physical features and PLSS were supplied to the county
Data set was loaded into GeoStor
Files were digitized using orthos and physical features.
Digital files were supplied back to the county for certification. Certification required the signature of authorized county officials stating the bounadry was correct.
Each coordinator provided UALR GIS Applications Laboratory with drawn maps, supplied map (step 1) marked up, and/or digital files
Topology was run on the statewide data set

attr.attrdef: County in which the fire district is contained

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Any comments pertaining to the fire district (alias, mergers, etc.)

distinfo.distliab: The data herein, including but not limited to geographic data, tabular data, analytical data, electronic data structures or files, are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, or statutory, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties or merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose. The entire risk as to the quality and performance of the data is assumed by the user. No guarantee of accuracy is granted, nor is any responsibility for reliance thereon assumed. In no event shall the UALR GIS Applications Laboratory be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, consequential or special damages of any kind, including, but not limited to, loss of anticipated profits or benefits arising out of use of or reliance on the data. The UALR GIS Applications Laboratory does not accept liability for any damages or misrepresentation caused by inaccuracies in the data or as a result of changes to the data caused by system transfers or other transformations or conversions, nor is there responsibility assumed to maintain the data in any manner or form. These data have been developed from the best available sources. Although efforts have been made to ensure that the data are accurate and reliable, errors and variable conditions originating from physical sources used to develop the data may be reflected in the data supplied. Users must be aware of these conditions and bear responsibility for the appropriate use of the information with respect to possible errors, scale, resolution, rectification, positional accuracy, development methodology, time period, environmental and climatic conditions and other circumstances specific to these data. The user is responsible for understanding the accuracy limitations of the data provided herein. The burden for determining fitness for use lies entirely with the user. The user should refer to the accompanying metadata notes for a description of the data and data development procedures. Although these data have been processed successfully on computers at the Arkansas Geographic Information Office, no guarantee, expressed or implied, is made by UALR GIS Applications Laboratory regarding the use of these data on any other system, nor does the act of distribution constitute or imply any such warranty. Distribution of these data is intended for information purposes and should not be considered authoritative for engineering, legal and other site-specific uses.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
